description_long: This is a classic wristwatch featuring a round, metallic case with a smooth, polished finish. The dial is minimalist, displaying only two hands for hours and minutes, with no visible numerals or indices, giving it a clean and understated look. The strap is a medium-brown color, likely made of leather, and is attached to the case with standard lugs. The strap has a traditional buckle clasp in a metallic finish, and several adjustment holes are visible for sizing. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear. There are no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments on the dial or strap.
description: A minimalist wristwatch with a round metallic case, brown leather strap, and a simple two-hand dial with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The watch is seen from the side, showing the full length of the brown strap and the round metallic case with a clear view of the buckle.
description_view_1: The watch is viewed from the buckle end, highlighting the adjustment holes and the width of the strap.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the strap and case, with the buckle now on the right and the dial hands visible.
description_view_3: The watch is viewed from the strap end, focusing on the metallic buckle and the back of the case.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is minimalist with a plain background, featuring only two hands (hour and minute) and no numerals, indices, or decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Classic leather strap in brown with adjustment holes and a standard buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with two hands (hour and minute), no numerals, indices, or complications.
